global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'SnapMeal' in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label that reads 'UGC' in a clean font, indicating user-generated content, placed near the logo.

elements.label: Cravings message
elements.description: A prominent text block that states 'Your cravings, delivered' in a large, bold font, centered at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fre Get offer

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A call-to-action button labeled 'Get offer' in a contrasting color, positioned directly below the body text.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A rectangular background shape that frames the main content, providing a subtle contrast to the text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and minimalistic, SnapMeal logo, SALE badge, cravings message, Get offer button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the discount badge at the top right, the body text is centered at the bottom, and the CTA is directly below it.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your cravings, delivered, Free delivery over $15, SnapMeal UGC, SALE, Get offer
